match.userMessage:
Gentle handheld push-in toward the marble vanity. Scarlett's sun-kissed hand, already extended, closes around the coral box, lifts it smoothly from the surface, and flips the lid open with a crisp snap. Bright sunlight slices across the moving box, creating shifting highlights and shadows on the white marble as the hand holds the open container steady.

distant gentle ocean waves and soft room tone. soft finger contact on marble, sharp snap of box lid opening.

Single continuous shot, no cuts. Avoid jitter and bent limbs.
